description: Expected canonical note ids per query (Task 3.6). `runRetrievalEval` scores the retriever's ranked note ids against these: recall@10 (fraction of a query's relevant notes in the top-10) and MRR (reciprocal rank of the first relevant note). Gates graduation only (acceptance-thresholds.md §retrieval: recall@10 ≥ 0.85, MRR ≥ 0.7).
